title: Submission: 12L SwiGLU + Batched PerDoc Q/K/V/Proj-LoRA 30-Pass
author: preyam2002
body:
## Summary
- 12-layer SwiGLU (3.75x=1280, ~36.2M params) with NorMuon + Polar Express Muon(5-step) + FA3 Hopper
- Full GPTQ quantization (Hessian-aware Cholesky, actorder, 256-seq calibration, int8/int6/int5 mixed)
- Batched per-document Q/K/V/Proj LoRA TTT: 30 all-batched passes, rank-8 attn + rank-16 LM-head, per-module LR scaling (Q 0.5x, K 0.3x, V 1.5x, Proj 0.2x, LM-head 2x, bias 3x)
- 25-temperature diversity scoring (T±0.52), progressive PonderTTT (25%/40%/50%/0%), baddbmm fused LoRA
- Sliding window final pass (stride=48, shuffled, 15s reserve)
- Soft-Round QAT, 5% pruning, EMA 0.997 + exp-SWA

## Techniques
- No global TTT — all eval time allocated to per-document LoRA adaptation
- Per-batch LR cycling (5 candidates pass 0, 3 candidates passes 1-7)
- Chunk diversity across passes: 256/512/1024/2048/4096
- Front-loaded time allocation: pass 0 gets 3.0x, passes 1-7 get 1.5x

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify artifact + code fits within 16MB constraint
- [ ] Run on 8xH100 SXM with 600s train + 600s eval budget
- [ ] Validate BPB score

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
